articles.title: GOP devolves further into conspiracy and chaos in SAVE America Act debate - Democracy Docket
articles.description: Facing near-certain failure GOP senators turned away from persuasion and toward performance.
articles.content: In the first week of Senate debate over the SAVE America Act, Republicans laid bare their anti-voting agenda not a serious policy discussion, but a spiraling mix of conspiracy theories, culture war g… [+11077 chars]
